series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of these files is to retain the original copy of the executed agreement and subsequent modifications togather with all supporting documents leading up to the execution of the Agreement.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain until released by the Administrator, Office of Contracts, then destroy ; Paper: Retain in office until acceptance of final payment whereupon files are microfilmed and destroyed. For agreements with stop work orders and projects with little or no project activity, as selected by the Administrator, Office of Contracts, the Office may transfer the files to the Records Center but retain such files until the above criteria has been met, Microform: Wastepaper ; Paper: Wastepaper
